name: Field Crew
description: Linesmen and technicians who perform physical work on the distribution network.

name: Asset Engineer
description: Engineers responsible for asset lifecycle planning, inspections, and maintenance strategies.

name: Network Controller
description: Operators who monitor and control the distribution network in real time from the NOC.

name: Customer Service Representative
description: Frontline staff handling customer inquiries, account management, and service requests.

name: Finance Analyst
description: Finance professionals managing accounts, billing, budgeting, and regulatory reporting.

name: HR Coordinator
description: HR staff managing recruitment, onboarding, payroll, and employee records.

name: Warehouse Operator
description: Staff managing materials receipt, storage, issuance, and inventory counts.

name: IT Administrator
description: System administrators managing Azure, SAP, Dynamics 365, and integration platforms.

name: Executive Leadership
description: CEO, CFO, COO, and other C-suite leaders requiring strategic-level access.

name: External AI Consultancy
description: Data science and AI team responsible for developing machine learning models and analytics on the Azure Databricks platform for the ERT project.

name: Authorised Electrical Installer
description: Third-party authorised electrical installers who commission inverters at customer sites and configure export limits via the LV DERMS system.
